node.title: Need help identifying interview question from Snap and Uber

topic.title: Need help identifying interview question from Snap and Uber

post.content:
There is a question that Snap and Uber have asked that I can't identify here on leetcode. 

https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/1640386/snap-phone-screen-failed-mv
https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/1743365/uber-onsite

Let's see if this community can help me find an existing question that is similar to these questions.

I'm not sure about an existing question, but the answer is to first use rotten oranges (BFS) for the hive to expand in all directions and re-label the grass tiles by the minute (T_h) in which the hive gets there, then move the bear through the grass tiles using A* provided T_b is less than T_h for each tile. 

Get the smallest T_h - T_b for the shortest path tiles so the answer (minutes bear can wait) is ultimately: smallest(T_h - T_b) - 1 

(the -1 is assuming simultaneous turns. If the bear moves first in a sequential game it's not needed, but the questions linked use simul)
